# Quilliam AI
> A UK AI agency offering education and implementation under one roof

> Full version: https://quilliam.ai/llms-full.txt
> Last updated: 2026-04-11

## About
Quilliam AI is the trading name of Quilliam AI Ltd (UK Companies House number 17151006, incorporated 2026-04-11, registered office in Cornwall, England). Founded by Levi Quilliam, it operates as a UK AI agency offering two complementary services: AI Education (training, workshops, and knowledge systems so your team can use AI properly) and AI Implementation (building automations, agents, n8n workflows, and custom ChatGPT or Claude tools), plus Digital Services (websites, SEO, content production) as the digital foundation that supports the AI work. We work with UK businesses of all shapes and sizes. Every engagement starts with a free AI Audit and is handoff-first — the deliverable is a skill or system your team actually owns, not a bespoke framework.

## Services
- AI Education: Hands-on workshops, role-tailored training, and optional AI knowledge systems (Claude Code + Obsidian "Company Brain") so your team can use ChatGPT, Claude, and custom AI tools confidently in their daily work. URL slug: /services/ai-training
- AI Implementation: Custom AI automations, agents, n8n workflows, API integrations, and bespoke ChatGPT/Claude tools built for your business. We do the work, you get the outcomes. URL slug: /services/ai-automation
- Digital Services: Professional websites, SEO, Google Business Profile, and content production — the digital foundation that supports your AI work. URL slug: /services/digital-services

## How It Works — The AI Audit
1. We Listen: A focused conversation where we understand your business, your team, and where AI could help.
2. We Teach or Build: We recommend education, implementation, or both — whatever fits. If training, we run it tailored to your team. If building, we ship fast.
3. You Run With It: You get skills and systems you can actually use. We document everything, hand it over, and provide ongoing support when you need it. No lock-in.

## Pricing
- Free AI Audit (intro session, 30-60 minutes)
- Day-rate consulting: £300–£400 per day
- Website packages from £500
- Fixed-price implementation packages from £500 depending on scope
